matchingDescription: UK Lifetime ISA for first-time home buyers, government bonus on savings, stocks and shares ISA, SIPP pension, AJ Bell low-cost investment platform

variants.text: Save for your first home with AJ Bell's Lifetime ISA and earn a 25% government bonus on up to £4,000 per year — simple, low-cost, and flexible.
AJ Bell's Stocks and Shares ISA offers low-cost dealing from £1.50 per trade — a straightforward way to invest in funds, shares, and ETFs tax-free.
Plan for retirement with AJ Bell's low-cost SIPP — access thousands of investments and manage your pension alongside your ISA in one account.
Switch your ISA to AJ Bell and get low-cost access to thousands of investments, with dealing from £1.50 per trade and no ISA transfer fees.
First-time buyer? AJ Bell's Lifetime ISA adds a 25% government bonus to your savings — use it toward a deposit on a home worth up to £450,000.

HMRC data shows fewer than 40% of eligible first-time buyers use a Lifetime ISA, missing up to £1,000 per year in government bonuses. AJ Bell's LISA lets you invest that bonus rather than hold it in cash.

Saving £400 per month into a Lifetime ISA from age 25 generates £12,000 in government bonuses alone by age 35 — without any investment growth. AJ Bell's LISA charges no annual platform fee on cash savings.

With average UK first-home prices above £300,000, a 10% deposit requires over three years of £833 monthly savings. A Lifetime ISA with AJ Bell reduces that timeline by adding 25p for every £1 saved, up to £4,000 per year.
